bugs_used: 1. Missing 'requests' import — will cause ImportError in CI. 2. Off-by-one in date filter (>=) — includes one extra day every run. 3. datetime.datetime used but not imported — NameError at runtime. 4. Exception handler swallows errors silently — invisible data loss.
slo_priority: Monitor for ImportError in CI, as it will halt the pipeline immediately and prevent further issues.
